descriptionText: Trimaran 78 For Sale 1988| Guest Cabins: 6| Crew Cabins: 2|Tax paid refitted 2003, 2014, 2022 The Trimaran 78 For Sale 1988 is a spacious, well‑kept multihull that offers both comfort and capability, making her an appealing option for anyone seeking a large cruising trimaran in good condition. Built in 1988 and thoughtfully refitted across several key years—2003, 2014 and most recently in 2022—she has been maintained with care and consistency. Her current location in the Dodecanese, Greece, places her in a convenient and beautiful cruising area for viewings or immediate sailing.Specifications:• Location: Dodecanese, Greece • Year Built: 1988, refitted 2003, 2014, 2022 • LOA: 23.90 m • Beam: 8.4 m • Draft: 2.5 m • Cabins: 6 double ensuite + 2 crew • Heads: 7 • Fuel: 5000 L • Water: 5200 L • Engines: 3 (Perkins 60hp x2, Volvo 305hp x1) • Generators: 2 Westerbeke • Air Conditioning: Yes • Mainsail: Fully battened • Genoa: Roller furling • Navigation: GPS, autopilot, full instruments • Dinghy & Outboard: YesOverall, this Trimaran presents as a well‑maintained and thoughtfully updated yacht, ready for her next owner to enjoy Contact Us !
descriptionHtml:
Trimaran 78 For Sale 1988| Guest Cabins: 6| Crew Cabins: 2|Tax paid
refitted 2003, 2014, 2022

The Trimaran 78 For Sale 1988 is a spacious, well‑kept multihull that offers both comfort and capability, making her an appealing option for anyone seeking a large cruising trimaran in good condition. Built in 1988 and thoughtfully refitted across several key years—2003, 2014 and most recently in 2022—she has been maintained with care and consistency. Her current location in the Dodecanese, Greece, places her in a convenient and beautiful cruising area for viewings or immediate sailing.

Specifications:

• Location: Dodecanese, Greece
• Year Built: 1988, refitted 2003, 2014, 2022
• LOA: 23.90 m
• Beam: 8.4 m
• Draft: 2.5 m
• Cabins: 6 double ensuite + 2 crew
• Heads: 7
• Fuel: 5000 L
• Water: 5200 L
• Engines: 3 (Perkins 60hp x2, Volvo 305hp x1)
• Generators: 2 Westerbeke
• Air Conditioning: Yes
• Mainsail: Fully battened
• Genoa: Roller furling
• Navigation: GPS, autopilot, full instruments
• Dinghy & Outboard: Yes

Overall, this Trimaran  presents as a well‑maintained and thoughtfully updated yacht, ready for her next owner to enjoy Contact Us !
